skills.name: adapt

skills.name: aeon

Particularly suited for univariate and multivariate time series analysis with scikit-learn compatible APIs.

skills.name: arboreto

Best for cross-database analysis, ID mapping across services. For quick single-database lookups use gget; for sequence/file manipulation use biopython.
